nameMeanings.name: Crosbiei
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and Irish: habitational name from one or other of the places in Scotland called Crosbie or Corsbie in Ayrshire, Kirkcudbrightshire, Berwickshire. The medieval family of Crosbie in Scotland were followers of the Bruce lords of Annandale.

variants.name: Crosby
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called with Old Norse kross ‘cross’ + bȳ ‘farm, settlement’ in Lancashire, Cumberland, Westmorland, North Yorkshire, and Lincolnshire.
Irish: surname adopted by bearers of the Gaelic name Mac an Chrosáin (see McCrossen ).

History: The surname of the Irish family of Crosbie is ultimately derived from providing the chief bards to the O’Mores, Chiefs of Leix: crosán means ‘bard’ or ‘satirist’. Pádraic Mac Crosáin or Mac An Chrosáin took the Anglicized name Patrick Crosbie c. 1583.

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

en.lifeSummary: Janet Crosbiei was born in 1437, in Scotland, United Kingdom as the daughter of Robert Crossebi of Oulcottis and Mrs Robert Crossebi. She had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald. She died in 1484, in Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Janet Crosbiei est née en 1437, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, fille de Robert Crossebi of Oulcottis et Mrs Robert Crossebi. Elle a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald. Elle est décédée en 1484, à Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Janet Crosbiei wurde 1437 in Schottland, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Robert Crossebi of Oulcottis und Mrs Robert Crossebi geboren. Sie hatte mit John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1484 im Alter von 47 Jahren in Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland.

it.lifeSummary: Janet Crosbiei è nata il nel 1437 nel Scozia, Regno Unito come figlia di Robert Crossebi of Oulcottis e Mrs Robert Crossebi. Lei avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald. Morì nel 1484, nel Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Janet Crosbieiは1437年にイギリススコットランドでRobert Crossebi of OulcottisとMrs Robert Crossebiの娘として生まれた。彼女はJohn Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwaldとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1484年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアトルソルワルドで47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Janet Crosbiei(은)는 1437년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 Robert Crossebi of Oulcottis(와)과 Mrs Robert Crossebi의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1484년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 토르토월드에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Janet Crosbiei nasceu em 1437, em Escócia, United Kingdom filha de Robert Crossebi of Oulcottis e Mrs Robert Crossebi. Ela teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald. Ela faleceu em 1484, em Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Janet Crosbiei родилась в 1437 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Robert Crossebi of Oulcottis и Mrs Robert Crossebi. У неё было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald. Она умерла в 1484 г. в местности тортаурвалд, думфриессхир, Шотландия в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Janet Crosbiei nació en 1437, en Escocia, Reino Unido como hija de Robert Crossebi of Oulcottis y Mrs Robert Crossebi. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con John Carlyle 1st Lord of Torthorwald. Murió en 1484, en Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, a la edad de 47 años.
